expected_action: block edit that adds .nullable() to a src/tools tool schema
directive: In src/tools/**/*.ts tool definition files, do not add zod.object() or .nullable() calls to tool schemas; represent complex inputs as short optional strings or flat primitive fields instead. Uses outside src/tools/**/*.ts are out of scope.

content: Allow get_network_request to accept null for reqid when the selected request should be used.

content.text: I’ll update the network tool schema to accept null.

name: tool
content: The get_network_request schema has reqid as an optional number.

name: tool
content: Blocked: tool schemas in src/tools/**/*.ts must not add .nullable(); use optional fields instead.
